items.title: Mavericks Acquire Santi Aldama From Grizzlies For Protected 2030 Pick Via Warriors
items.originalTitle: Mavericks Acquire Santi Aldama From Grizzlies For Protected 2030 Pick Via Warriors
items.headlineZh: 独行侠从灰熊得到 Santi Aldama
items.titleZh: 独行侠从灰熊得到 Santi Aldama
items.summary: The Dallas Mavericks have acquired Santi Aldama from the Memphis Grizzlies for AJ Johnson, a protected 2030 first round pick via the Golden State Warriors and two future second round picks. The Mavericks also acquire the draft rights to Tarik Biberovic. Aldama appeared in 43 games with the Grizzlies last season, averaging 14.0 points, 6.7 rebounds and 2.9 assists in 27.9 minutes. Aldama signed a three-year, $52.5 million deal with the Grizzlies last offseason.
items.summaryZh: 据 RealGM 报道，独行侠从灰熊得到 Santi Aldama，送出 AJ Johnson、一个来自勇士的受保护 2030 年首轮签、两个未来次轮签。
items.oneLineZh: 独行侠从灰熊得到 Santi Aldama

items.title: 76ers Acquire Jaylen Brown From Celtics For Paul George, Two First Round Picks
items.originalTitle: 76ers Acquire Jaylen Brown From Celtics For Paul George, Two First Round Picks
items.headlineZh: 费城 76 人从凯尔特人得到 Jaylen Brown
items.titleZh: 费城 76 人从凯尔特人得到 Jaylen Brown
items.summary: The Philadelphia 76ers have acquired Jaylen Brown from the Boston Celtics for Paul George, two first round picks and two second round picks. The Sixers are sending a 2028 first round pick that could convert from a first to a swap that is more favorable to the Celtics, a 2031 unprotected first rounder, the most favorable 2028 second rounder of the Golden State Warriors, Oklahoma City Thunder, Milwaukee Bucks plus the most favorable 2030 second rounder out of the Washington Wizards, Portland Trail Blazers and Phoenix Suns. The Celtics canvassed the NBA over the past week searching for an acceptable trade of Brown after their attempts to trade him to the Bucks for Giannis Antetokounmpo were unsuccessful. Shams Charania reported that he first received word of these discussions earlier on Wednesday. Brown appeared in 71 games during the 2025-26 season, averaging 28.7 points, 6.9 rebounds and 5.1 assists in 34.4 minutes as he led the Celtics to 56 wins in what was expected to be a gap year without Jayson Tatum and after trading away Kristaps Porzingis and Jrue Holiday. Brown is on a $57 million contract for the 2026-27 season followed by $61 million in 2027-28 and $64.9 million in 2028-29. Brown will become eligible for a a two-year, $141.8 million contract extension. George appeared in 37 games this season, averaging 17.3 points, 5.3 rebounds, 3.6 assists and 1.7 steals in 30.7 minutes. George shot 39.2 percent on three-pointers. George is owed $54.1 million in 2026-27 and has a player option for $56.6 million in 2027-28. The Sixers will enter next season with a core of Tyrese Maxey, Joel Embiid, VJ Edgecombe plus Brown. The Sixers also signed Dean Wade in free agency on Tuesday.
items.summaryZh: 据 Yahoo Sports / RealGM 报道，费城 76 人从凯尔特人得到 Jaylen Brown，送出 Paul George、两个首轮签、两个次轮签。
items.oneLineZh: 费城 76 人从凯尔特人得到 Jaylen Brown

items.title: NBA Cuts Dozens Of Jobs As League Shifts Focus To Global Growth
items.originalTitle: NBA Cuts Dozens Of Jobs As League Shifts Focus To Global Growth
items.headlineZh: NBA 裁员数十人，转向全球增长业务
items.titleZh: NBA 裁员数十人，转向全球增长业务
items.summary: The NBA eliminated dozens of jobs Wednesday as the league continues reallocating resources toward growth areas including NBA Europe and its expanding local television business. The layoffs come nine months after Commissioner Adam Silver reorganized the league office with an emphasis on global expansion and viewership. According to an internal memo from Silver obtained by Sports Business Journal, the cuts affect several business departments and support staff but will also lead to new strategic hires. "The changes today are a continuation of the strategy we announced in September which will enable us to invest further, including in new positions and hiring, in key growth areas such as local media, programming and technology, the WNBA and the creation of a new league in Europe," said Silver in the memo. "These new investments will best position us to achieve our key objectives, including a better understanding of our fans, improving the game and viewership, and driving global growth across our leagues." The timing follows the closing of final bids for NBA Europe franchises Tuesday and comes just nine days after Matt Volk began his newly created role as general manager of local media. Silver still needs to hire a chief executive for NBA Europe along with additional staff, many likely based in Europe, to help launch the new league. On the media side, 11 former Main Street Sports Group teams have yet to finalize local television deals with training camp less than three months away, pushing many toward streaming platforms or over-the-air options. Volk's department will oversee local media operations and work with teams to improve local broadcasts, a role expected to require additional staffing. The league is also planning a centralized hub for local broadcasts as early as the 2027-28 season, potentially housed by Google or YouTube, which could generate further hiring. Silver's memo noted that data and marketing departments were already consolidated under the Global Partnership and Media department in September, framing Wednesday's layoffs as the next step in that restructuring. He added that affected employees are being offered severance, health benefits and outplacement services.
items.summaryZh: 据 RealGM 报道，NBA 裁撤数十个岗位，并把资源重新分配到 NBA 欧洲、地方电视业务和全球增长等方向。
items.oneLineZh: NBA 裁员数十人，转向全球增长业务

items.summary: Meleek Thomas and the Cleveland Cavaliers have agreed to a four-year, $9.3 million deal after he was the 34th overall pick in the 2026 NBA draft. Thomas is represented by Sam Permut . Thomas will have the first three seasons of the deal fully guaranteed for a total of $6.4 million. Thomas appeared in 37 games at Arkansas, averaging 15.6 points, 3.8 rebounds, 2.5 assists and 1.5 steals in 30.5 minutes.

items.title: Tobias Harris Expected To Leave Pistons, Could Sign With Spurs
items.originalTitle: Tobias Harris Expected To Leave Pistons, Could Sign With Spurs
items.headlineZh: Tobias Harris Expected 签约动向更新
items.titleZh: Tobias Harris Expected 签约动向更新
items.summary: Tobias Harris has had two productive seasons with the Detroit Pistons to help support the franchise's resurgence around Cade Cunningham, but he will likely exit in free agency this offseason. The Pistons already signed his probable replacement in John Collins on a three-year, $51 million contract . "They're going to lose Tobias Harris," said Brian Windhorst. Harris averaged 13.3 points, 5.1 rebounds and 2.5 assists in 27.7 minutes across 63 games with the Pistons. The San Antonio Spurs are looking to sign a forward in free agency and Harris could be an option on a shorter contract. "Tobias Harris has a chance to end up one San Antonio," added Windhorst.

items.title: Nuggets Reach Out To LeBron James In Free Agency
items.originalTitle: Nuggets Reach Out To LeBron James In Free Agency
items.headlineZh: 签约动态：掘金 Reach Out To LeBron James 在 自由市场
items.titleZh: 签约动态：掘金 Reach Out To LeBron James 在 自由市场
items.summary: The Denver Nuggets have reached out to express interest in signing LeBron James. James made the decision on Tuesday that he will explore his options in free agency and leave the Los Angeles Lakers after eight seasons with the franchise. The Nuggets tried to recruit James to the Nuggets in 2018 when he was a free agent and ultimately left the Cleveland Cavaliers for the Lakers. James has described Nuggets team president Josh Kroenke as a "very dear friend." The Nuggets would give James the opportunity to team up with Nikola Jokic. The Golden State Warriors, Cleveland Cavaliers and Miami Heat have been mentioned by ESPN as the three most probable destinations for James. But with James willing to take less money in free agency, the Nuggets open up as a possibility.
items.summaryZh: 据 RealGM / Yahoo Sports 报道，签约动态：掘金 Reach Out To LeBron James 在 自由市场，原文关注掘金 Reach Out 的合同或自由市场动向。

items.summary: Moe Wagner and the Brooklyn Nets have agreed to a two-year, $19 million deal. The deal contains a clause where either side can opt-in to the second season of the contract. Wagner appeared in 36 games last season with the Orlando Magic returning from a torn ACL and averaged 6.9 points and 3.2 rebounds in 11.9 minutes. Wagner will be playing in his age-29 season.

items.titleZh: 奇才续约 Jamir Watkins to 双向 合同
items.summary: The Washington Wizards have re-signed Jamir Watkins to a two-way contract, the team announced Wednesday. Washington has re-signed Watkins just days after it declined his $2.15 million team option for the 2026-27 season. The Wizards did something similar in 2024, when they declined Tristan Vukcevic’s team option before signing him to a two-way contract. By […]

items.titleZh: Jamir Watkins 与奇才达成双向合同
items.summary: Jamir Watkins and the Washington Wizards have agreed to a two-way deal. Watkins averaged 7.4 points, 3.9 rebounds and 1.3 assists in 20.6 minutes across 50 games with the Wizards last season. Watkins also appeared in nine G League games, averaging 13.7 points, 7.3 rebounds, 2.1 assists and 1.9 steals in 32.9 minutes. Watkins was the 43rd overall pick in the 2025 NBA draft out of Florida State and is represented by Drew Morrison and Sam Rose .

items.title: Jonathan Isaac, Magic Agree To One-Year Deal
items.originalTitle: Jonathan Isaac, Magic Agree To One-Year Deal
items.headlineZh: Jonathan Isaac 与魔术达成一年合同
items.titleZh: Jonathan Isaac 与魔术达成一年合同
items.summary: Jonathan Isaac and the Orlando Magic have agreed to a one-year deal. The Magic waived Isaac before the start of free agency and he still receive the $8 million he was guaranteed. Isaac never fully recovered from a series of injuries that kept him to playing just 45 games over four seasons from 2019-20 through 2022-23. This past season, the defensive-minded big man averaged 2.6 points and 2.5 rebounds in 10 minutes per game over 52 appearances. The Magic also signed Nikola Vucevic on the first full day of free agency. Isaac has been with the Magic since he was the sixth overall pick in the 2017 NBA draft.

items.summary: The Golden State Warriors and De'Anthony Melton have agreed to a two-year, $11 million deal with a player option in Year 2. Melton appeared in 49 games with the Warriors last season after returning from a torn ACL, averaging 12.3 points, 3.2 rebounds, 2.6 assists and 1.6 steals in 23.0 minutes. Melton is represented by Joe Smith , Thaddeus Foucher and Aaron Klevan .

items.title: Jaylen Brown Not Seeking Trade As Celtics Motivated To Find Deal
items.originalTitle: Jaylen Brown Not Seeking Trade As Celtics Motivated To Find Deal
items.headlineZh: Jaylen Brown 被交易至 76 人
items.titleZh: Jaylen Brown 被交易至 76 人
items.summary: The Boston Celtics have been actively shopping guard Jaylen Brown, soliciting offers from roughly eight to 10 teams over the past several days, according to ESPN's Shams Charania. Brown has not requested or signaled a preference for a trade, with the push coming entirely from the front office. Charania made the comments Wednesday on ESPN's First Take, noting that Boston has set a high asking price throughout the process. "Sources tell me the Celtics have actually started strongly shopping Jaylen Brown, soliciting offers from a market of about 8 to 10 teams in the last several days," said Charania. "It's unclear whether a deal is close or where they necessarily stand, but there's been a high price threshold that the Celtics have set from the outset of any type of a Jaylen Brown trade. "We know a couple weeks ago they offered Jaylen Brown and two first-round picks for Giannis Antetokounmpo, so clearly they would be willing to move him for a premium player. Is there a player like Giannis out there right now in the market? Probably not. So then you turn your attention to a package of draft capital. And so, they have asked some teams for at least four first-round picks. Clearly, no deal done yet. "And just to be clear here, this is the organization choosing to put Jaylen Brown's name out there among teams. My understanding is Jaylen Brown has not requested a trade. This is not something that he has advocated for. So, think about it: if you're Jaylen Brown, you just won Finals MVP in 2024, you're an MVP finalist this past season, and the Celtics are now working to try to move Jaylen Brown." Brian Windhorst said he expects Boston to continue pursuing a trade for Brown regardless of how the situation initially resolves, even suggesting the guard could be shopped again later if he starts the season with the team. "So, what we've come to understand was the Celtics weren't trying to get Giannis Antetokounmpo and realizing, 'Boy, we have to give up Jaylen Brown to get him,'" said Windhorst. "They've decided that they're trading Jaylen Brown, and they just decided to offer him for Giannis Antetokounmpo. You've got to focus on it the other way. They've decided they're done with him, and so no, I don't think they're going to keep him. I think they're going to do everything they possibly can to trade him, and that's what their actions are showing here. "Their actions are showing that not only are they motivated to trade him, they're not even focused on trading him for a package of players. Like, you know, it'd be one thing if you thought, 'Look, he replicates Tatum a little bit too much. Tatum's coming off this injury, and we had to thin out our big man position, so we just need to reallocate our resources. So, let's look for two really good players.' That's not what they're doing. "They're asking for draft picks. They're basically saying, even if we have to take a step back as an organization and hold onto these draft picks and either use them to get young players or package them for a trade later, even if we have to take a step back, that is more preferable right now to bringing Jaylen Brown back. That's what their actions are saying. "And so, no, I do think that there is a pathway and a possibility that they don't find a trade, because you're talking about 40 cents, whether it's 40 cents or 60 cents on the dollar, you can't do a trade like that with a player in his prime. So, I do think there's a possibility that they don't find a trade and we get into the season, and maybe there's some uncomfortable weeks or months. But Jaylen Brown is not going to be a long-term Celtic. One way or another, he's on his way out of town. They've decided that, and it's kind of fascinating to see how this has played out." Despite the Celtics' efforts to find a trade, there doesn't appear to be any traction towards a deal at this time.
items.summaryZh: 据 RealGM 报道，Jaylen Brown 被交易至 76 人，这笔交易继续影响凯尔特人与 76 人的阵容评估。
items.oneLineZh: Jaylen Brown 被交易至 76 人

items.titleZh: Collin Sexton 与湖人达成两年，1900 万美元合同
items.summary: Collin Sexton and the Los Angeles Lakers have agreed to a two-year, $19 million deal in free agency. Sexton will have a player option for the 2027-28 season. Sexton appeared in 68 games last season with the Charlotte Hornets and Chicago Bulls, averaging 15.4 points, 2.3 rebounds and 3.3 assists in 23.7 minutes in his age-26 season. Sexton is represented by Austin Brown and Max Saidman .

items.title: Quentin Grimes, Lakers Agree To Four-Year, $60M Deal
items.originalTitle: Quentin Grimes, Lakers Agree To Four-Year, $60M Deal
items.headlineZh: Quentin Grimes 与湖人达成四年，6000 万美元合同
items.titleZh: Quentin Grimes 与湖人达成四年，6000 万美元合同
items.summary: Quentin Grimes and the Los Angeles Lakers have agreed to a four-year, $60 million deal with a player option for Year 4. Grimes played the 2025-26 season under the qualifying offer with the Philadelphia 76ers after he was unable to secure a long-term deal in restricted free agency. Grimes previously played alongside Luka Doncic with the Dallas Mavericks. In 75 games last season, Grimes averaged 13.4 points, 3.6 rebounds and 3.3 assists in 29.4 minutes for the Sixers. Grimes is represented by Austin Brown and Steven Heumann .

items.title: Sandro Mamukelashvili, Lakers Agree To Four-Year, $52M Deal
items.originalTitle: Sandro Mamukelashvili, Lakers Agree To Four-Year, $52M Deal
items.headlineZh: Sandro Mamukelashvili 与湖人达成四年，5200 万美元合同
items.titleZh: Sandro Mamukelashvili 与湖人达成四年，5200 万美元合同
items.summary: Sandro Mamukelashvili and the Los Angeles Lakers have agreed to a four-year, $52 million deal with a player option in Year 4 and is fully guaranteed. Mamukelashvili appeared in 80 games last season with the Toronto Raptors, averaging 11.2 points, 4.9 rebounds and 1.9 assists in 21.9 minutes. Mamukelashvili also shot 38.9 percent on three-pointers. Mamukelashvili will effectively be the replacement for Rui Hachimura, who is expected to receive a more lucrative contract on the open market.

items.title: Walker Kessler From Jazz To Lakers In Four-Year, $130M Sign-And-Trade For Two FRPs, Two Swaps
items.originalTitle: Walker Kessler From Jazz To Lakers In Four-Year, $130M Sign-And-Trade For Two FRPs, Two Swaps
items.headlineZh: 湖人通过先签后换得到 Walker Kessler
items.titleZh: 湖人通过先签后换得到 Walker Kessler
items.summary: Walker Kessler has agreed to join the Los Angeles Lakers on a four-year, $130 million sign-and-trade that will send unprotected first round picks in 2031 and 2033 along with first round pick swaps in 2028 and 2030 to the Utah Jazz. The Jazz were expected to match any offer sheet Kessler signed in restricted free agency, which led to the negotiation of a sign-and-trade with Utah getting significant draft capital back in return. Utah offered a five-year, $150 million contract to Kessler. The Lakers entered the offseason with up to five tradeable first round picks and now only have one left with their 2032 swap available. Kessler appeared in just five games last season due to a torn labrum i his left shoulder in November. During the 2024-25 season, Kessler averaged 11.1 points, 12.2 rebounds, 1.7 assists and 2.4 blocks in 30.0 minutes across 58 games. Kessler was originally acquired by the Jazz in the 2022 Rudy Gobert trade as this further adds to Utah's draft haul originating from that deal with the Minnesota Timberwolves. The Jazz re-signed Jusuf Nurkic this offseason on a two-year, $22 million deal and will give the team depth at center. Kessler is represented by Aaron Mintz , Houston Kessler and Dave Spahn . The Lakers are now expected to reach agreements with Sandro Mamukelashvili and Quentin Grimes.
items.summaryZh: 据 Yahoo Sports / RealGM 报道，湖人从爵士通过四年 13000 万美元先签后换得到 Walker Kessler，送出两个首轮签、两次选秀权互换。
items.oneLineZh: 湖人通过先签后换得到 Walker Kessler

items.summary: Mitchell Robinson and the Boston Celtics have agreed to a three-year, $47.4 million contract with a player option in Year 3. The Celtics have prioritized adding size to their team and they do so by signing Robinson away from the New York Knicks. Robinson will be signed by the Celtics using their non-taxpayer midlevel exception. Robinson appeared in 60 games last season with the Celtics, averaging 5.7 points, 8.8 rebounds and 1.2 blocks in 19.6 minutes.

items.summary: Mike Conley Jr. and the Boston Celtics have agreed to a one-year deal. Conley has spent the past three-plus seasons with the Minnesota Timberwolves. items.titleZh: Norman Powell 签约动向更新
items.summary: The Chicago Bulls and guard Norman Powell have agreed to a two-year, $45 million contract. This will use up most of Chicago's remaining cap space. Powell was a first-time All-Star for the Miami Heat last season. The 33-year-old shooting guard averaged 21.7 points, 3.5 rebounds, 2.5 assists and 1.1 steals per game. Powell shot 47% from the field, including 38% on three-pointers. Powell was traded to Miami ahead of last season from the LA Clippers. In addition to the Heat and Clippers, Powell has also played for the Toronto Raptors and Portland Trail Blazers in his 11-year NBA career.
items.dekZh: 芝加哥公牛与后卫 Norman Powell 达成两年，4500 万美元合同。
items.summaryZh: 据 RealGM 报道，交易动态：Norman Powell，公牛 达成 两年，4500 万美元合同。
items.oneLineZh: Norman Powell 签约动向更新
keyPoints: 芝加哥公牛与后卫 Norman Powell达成两年，4500万美元合同。

items.title: Jazz Guarantee Contracts For Kyle Filipowski, Svi Mykhailiuk
items.originalTitle: Jazz Guarantee Contracts For Kyle Filipowski, Svi Mykhailiuk
items.headlineZh: Guarantee Contracts For 签约动向更新
items.titleZh: Guarantee Contracts For 签约动向更新
items.summary: The Utah Jazz fully guaranteed the contracts for big man Kyle Filipowski and wing Svi Mykhailiuk for the 2026-27 season. Filipowski will hit the books at $3 million. Mykhailiuk will count at $3.85 million. In his second NBA season, Filipowski averaged 11.4 points, 7.2 rebounds and 2.6 assists. With the Jazz dealing with injuries at the center spot, Filipowski started in 41 of the 77 games he played last season. Mykhailiuk is valued as a stay-ready veteran off the bench. Despite an inconsistent role, the veteran wing shooter averaged 9.4 points on 48% shooting, including 41% on three-pointers.
items.summaryZh: 据 RealGM 报道，Guarantee Contracts For 的签约或合同动向成为焦点，原文围绕其自由市场前景展开。
items.oneLineZh: Guarantee Contracts For 签约动向更新

items.title: Clippers Guarantee Kris Dunn; Push Back Guarantee Date For Cam Christie
items.originalTitle: Clippers Guarantee Kris Dunn; Push Back Guarantee Date For Cam Christie
items.headlineZh: 快船 Guarantee Kris 相关消息更新
items.titleZh: 快船 Guarantee Kris 相关消息更新
items.summary: The LA Clippers have fully guaranteed the $5.7 million contract for guard Kris Dunn. The Clippers and Cam Christie agreed to amend the guarantee date for his $2.3 million contract. LA and Christie pushed that date back from June 30 to July 20. Dunn appeared in all 82 games (68 starts) for the Clippers last season. The veteran guard averaged 7.3 points, 3.3 rebounds, 3.6 assists and 1.6 steals. Dunn has become a consistent three-pointer shooter, in addition to being one of the top perimeter defenders in the NBA.
items.dekZh: 老将后卫场均7.3分，3.3篮板，3.6助攻和1.6抢断。

items.title: John Collins, Pistons Agree To Three-Year, $51M Contract
items.originalTitle: John Collins, Pistons Agree To Three-Year, $51M Contract
items.headlineZh: 交易动态：John Collins，活塞 达成 三年，5100 万美元合同
items.titleZh: 交易动态：John Collins，活塞 达成 三年，5100 万美元合同
items.summary: The Detroit Pistons have agreed to a three-year, $51 million contract with forward John Collins. Adding Collins gives the Pistons a veteran big man who can finish around the rim, as well as provide floor spacing for Cade Cunningham. In 69 games with the LA Clippers last season, Collins averaged 13.6 points and 5.3 rebounds in 27.1 minutes per game. The 28-year-old forward shot 55.2% from the field, including 40.6% on 3.2 three-point attempts per game. Collins played the first six years of his NBA career with the Atlanta Hawks. He then spent two years with the Utah Jazz before playing for the Clippers last season.
items.summaryZh: 据 RealGM 报道，交易动态：John Collins，活塞 达成 三年，5100 万美元合同，原文关注 John Collins 的合同或自由市场动向。
items.oneLineZh: 交易动态：John Collins，活塞 达成 三年，5100 万美元合同

items.title: Bulls Waive Kam Jones
items.originalTitle: Bulls Waive Kam Jones
items.headlineZh: 交易动态：公牛 Waive Kam Jones
items.titleZh: 交易动态：公牛 Waive Kam Jones
items.summary: The Chicago Bulls have waived guard Kam Jones. The Bulls will eat a guarantee of just more than $1 million in dead salary for Jones for the 2026-27 season. Chicago acquired Jones as part of a draft-day swap with the Indiana Pacers. The Bulls acquired cash and the right to swap two future second-round picks, while the Pacers landed the draft rights for Braden Smith.
items.summaryZh: 据 RealGM 报道，交易动态：公牛 Waive Kam Jones，原文提到芝加哥公牛 have waived 后卫 Kam Jones。
items.oneLineZh: 交易动态：公牛 Waive Kam Jones

items.title: Marcus Smart, Rockets Agree To Two-Year, $13M Deal
items.originalTitle: Marcus Smart, Rockets Agree To Two-Year, $13M Deal
items.headlineZh: Marcus Smart 与火箭达成两年，1300 万美元合同
items.titleZh: Marcus Smart 与火箭达成两年，1300 万美元合同
items.summary: Marcus Smart and the Houston Rockets have agreed to a two-year, $13 million contract. Smart had declined his $5.4 million player option with the Los Angeles Lakers to become an unrestricted free agent. Smart appeared in 62 games with the Lakers last season, averaging 9.3 points, 2.8 rebounds and 3.0 assists in 28.5 minutes in a bounce back season. Smart is represented by Jason Glushon and Josh Ketroser . The signing will not hard cap the Rockets, which will improve their chances of re-signing Tari Eason as a restricted free agent.
items.summaryZh: 据 RealGM 报道，Marcus Smart 与火箭达成两年，1300 万美元合同，原文关注 Marcus Smart 的合同或自由市场动向。
items.oneLineZh: Marcus Smart 与火箭达成两年，1300 万美元合同
